briefs.title: Section 29 of BC Liquor Licensing Regulation Repealed — What It Means for Your Business
briefs.summary: BC has removed Section 29 from the Liquor Control and Licensing Regulation, effective December 8, 2025. This rule no longer exists, which may change certain licensing requirements or restrictions for liquor-licensed businesses.
briefs.action_required: Check with the BC Liquor and Cannabis Regulation Branch to confirm how removing Section 29 affects your licence.
